arts.ttl: Swap deal: Chelsea & Euro giants hold “initial talks” over smart attacker transfers
arts.sum: Chelsea and Bayern Munich have reportedly held talks over a potential transfer exchange involving Mathys Tel and Christopher Nkunku. Nkunku hasn’t had much playing time since joining Chelsea, partly due to injuries, and it perhaps makes sense that he’s now open to a move elsewhere to get onto the pitch more regularly. arts.ttl: Veiga transfer makes sense for Chelsea on one front but leaves Maresca problem
arts.sum: There is speculation that Veiga sees himself as a centre-back in the long-term and with the imperious Levi Colwill looking like that position on the left-hand side of a back two is his for years to come, there is no wonder the Portugal international is considering a move away. Borussia Dortmund are in talks with Chelsea to sign Renato Veiga but the two clubs are still yet to reach an agreement, football.london understands.

arts.ttl: Rio Ngumoha: Why former Chelsea youngster could be future Liverpool star after Accrington Stanley FA Cup game
arts.sum: Rio Ngumoha is one of the brightest talents in English football and has a bright future with Liverpool and Arne Slot, should the club handle his development correctly.

arts.ttl: “Active talks” – Chelsea decide to let midfielder leave, Euro giants “pushing” for signing
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly ready to let Carney Chukwuemeka leave the club this January, having opened the door for a potential loan departure. That’s according to Fabrizio Romano, who has also posted on X about Borussia Dortmund entering into active talks and pushing to sign Chukwuemeka. arts.ttl: Chelsea make Mathys Tel transfer move as Christopher Nkunku Bayern Munich reality becomes clear
arts.sum: Chelsea would make an offer for Tel should Bayern give the Blues any sort of encouragement that the teenage forward is available this month. Chelsea have been in contact with Bayern Munich over a possible deal to sign Mathys Tel this month, football.london understands.
